SCHEDULE — STATUTORY DECLARATION
__________________________________
B.L.R.O. 1/2016

LAWS OF BRUNEI
Statutory Declarations CAP. 12 3
STATUTORY DECLARATIONS ACT
An Act to make provision concerning statutory declarations
Commencement: 11th January 1951
Citation
1. This Act may be cited as the Statutory Declarations Act.
Declarations made in Brunei Darussalam
2. It shall be lawful for any Magistrate or any officer authorised by His
Majesty the Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan to take and receive in Brunei
Darussalam the declaration of any person voluntarily making the declaration
in the form set out in the Schedule.
False declarations punishable under Penal Code
3. Declarations made in Brunei Darussalam by virtue of the provisions
of this Act shall be deemed to be such declarations as are referred to in
sections 199 and 200 of the Penal Code (Chapter 22).
Fees
4. A person making any declaration by virtue of the provisions of this Act
shall pay to the officer taking the declaration such fees as His Majesty the
Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan in Council may, by public notification,
prescribe.
SCHEDULE
STATUTORY DECLARATION
I, A.B, do solemnly and sincerely declare that , and I make this solemn
declaration conscientiously believing the same to be true, and by virtue of the provisions of
the Statutory Declarations Act (Chapter 12).
Subscribed and solemnly declared
by the above named in
Brunei Darussalam this day of
20 , (Signature of Declarant)
Before me,
Magistrate.
B.L.R.O. 1/2016
